assumptions: The single numeric column 'Sensor Value' was mapped to 'Website_Visits' and row index to 'Date' to satisfy the required schema.
Rows are indexed from 1 to 19 in the order they appear after the header.
Outliers were detected using the IQR rule: values < Q1 - 1.5*IQR or > Q3 + 1.5*IQR are outliers.
Values 24.0 (row 5) and -55.98 (row 16) are the only outliers and were removed to form the cleaned dataset.
All statistics (count, mean, median, std, min, max) are computed only on the cleaned dataset.
No missing or non-numeric values were present, so no imputation was required.
validation_notes: Outlier removal check: the values 24.0 and -55.98 do not appear in the cleaned_data_rows but are present in removed_rows, so outlier removal is consistent.
Statistical validity check: descriptive statistics were recomputed using only the 17 cleaned observations; no removed outliers were included in these calculations.
